How should a common data source like monthly sales totals be categorized?


dirty data


structured data


multimedia data


unstructured data


I don't know this yet.

Accenture processes and migrates data for an e-commerce firm to build an advanced data platform.

How does this platform benefit the firm?


increases product discounts


increases business returns


decreases customer retention


decreases vendor profits


I don't know this yet.

Based on the given information, it is not possible to determine how the data platform benefits the e-commerce firm. However, it could potentially benefit the firm by allowing for more efficient data processing and analysis, which could lead to better insights and informed business decisions.

What function do regulations like the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) serve?


to ensure companies are safeguarding customer data according to a set of minimum standards


to encourage companies to invest in data protection through compliance subsidies


to allow government agencies access to companies' customer data in the case of criminal proceedings


to enforce the protection of consumer data through criminal penalties against non-compliant corporations


I don't know this yet.

Regulations like the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) serve to ensure that companies are safeguarding customer data according to a set of minimum standards. The regulations are focused on protecting the privacy and personal data of individuals and give them greater control over their own data. The GDPR also imposes penalties on companies that fail to comply with these standards, in order to enforce data protection and ensure that companies take it seriously.

How does Accenture help companies turn less meaningful data collection into an effective data strategy?


by developing and generating cultural support and alignment and a growth mindset


by offering data insight when curating courses on data and supplying


by recommending the tools and platforms to drive the data analytics, governance, and process


by increasing their confidence when talking about data with teams and introducing new data principles and mindsets


I don't know this yet.

Accenture helps companies turn less meaningful data collection into an effective data strategy by recommending the tools and platforms to drive data analytics, governance, and process. Additionally, Accenture can provide guidance on the development and implementation of data-related initiatives, such as developing cultural support and alignment for a growth mindset, curating data-focused training programs, and introducing new data principles and mindsets to increase confidence among teams when discussing data.

How do Machine Learning (ML) and Artificial Intelligence (AI) technologies help businesses use their enterprise data effectively?


They capture all the data in real-time or near real-time.


They collate the content of qualitative data, like text and images.


They curate data quickly for multiple business scenarios.


They allow technologies to operate without data.


I don't know this yet.

Machine Learning (ML) and Artificial Intelligence (AI) technologies help businesses use their enterprise data effectively by curating data quickly for multiple business scenarios. These technologies can sift through massive amounts of data to identify patterns and insights that would be difficult or impossible for humans to identify on their own. This can help businesses make more informed decisions, streamline operations, and improve customer experiences. Additionally, these technologies can collate the content of qualitative data, like text and images, to extract valuable insights and allow for more comprehensive understanding of customer behavior and market trends.

They capture all the data in real-time or near real-time.


They collate the content of qualitative data, like text and images.

Machine Learning (ML) and Artificial Intelligence (AI) technologies help businesses use their enterprise data effectively by curating data quickly for multiple business scenarios. These technologies can sift through massive amounts of data to identify patterns and insights that would be difficult or impossible for humans to identify on their own. This can help businesses make more informed decisions, streamline operations, and improve customer experiences. What is an example of Big Data?


sending user survey responses from various store branches to a single, central database


entering and tracking a company's daily transaction records in a spreadsheet


providing real-time data feeds on millions of people with wearable devices


tracking the work hours of 100 employees with a real-time dashboard


I don't know this yet.

An example of Big Data is providing real-time data feeds on millions of people with wearable devices. This involves collecting and analyzing massive amounts of data generated by millions of devices, which can include information on individuals' activity levels, heart rates, sleep patterns, and more. This data can then be used for a variety of purposes, such as improving health outcomes, developing new products and services, or enhancing customer experiences.

What does data warehousing allow organizations to achieve?


allows organizations to replace all their day-to-day databases with operational systems


allows for analytics and reporting across the entire organization


allows organizations to collect only the current day's data from their various databases


allows for the reduction of some of an organization's day-to-day server resources


I don't know this yet.

Data warehousing allows organizations to achieve analytics and reporting across the entire organization. It involves consolidating data from various sources into a centralized repository, which can be accessed by analysts and business intelligence tools to generate insights and reports. By having a single, unified view of the data, organizations can more easily identify trends, patterns, and opportunities across different departments and functions. Data warehousing does not replace day-to-day databases or reduce server resources, but it does provide a powerful tool for leveraging data to drive business outcomes.

How does Accenture help companies harness the power of data to achieve optimal business outcomes?


They develop data governance frameworks that go on to form the basis of the company's data analytics strategy.


They help companies think about and define the "art of the possible" with their data assets.


They utilize only their data and analytics platform to enable companies.


They provide an interactive front end for a database solution that changes the data culture.


I don't know this yet.

Accenture helps companies harness the power of data to achieve optimal business outcomes by helping companies think about and define the "art of the possible" with their data assets. Accenture works with clients to identify business challenges and opportunities where data analytics can make a difference, and then help them develop strategies to capture, manage, and analyze data effectively. Accenture may also develop data governance frameworks to ensure that data is managed responsibly and aligned with business objectives. Additionally, Accenture can provide a range of services and solutions to help companies implement and scale their data analytics initiatives, including data platform development and implementation, data visualization, and machine learning and AI technologies.
